title: What Dendrites Do
script_summary: Explore the fascinating role of dendrites in neuronal communication.

segments.voiceover: Dendrites are the unseen architects of your thoughts.
These delicate branches extend from neurons, ready to catch incoming signals.
Imagine each dendrite as a tiny antenna, tuning into the chatter of the brain.
Research shows they help shape our memories and responses.
So, when you learn something new, remember: your dendrites are working overtime!
Want to dive deeper into the brain's mysteries? Hit that follow button!
